creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
This is not your usual Dubai desert safari. Platinum Heritage offers eco-luxury desert trips, and it’s ultra special! 💕

Here’s how it went:
* Our journey started in the city. We were picked up in a Range Rover by a warm and friendly staff. Shout out to Mr. Ali.
* Upon arrival at the desert camp, each of us received a traditional headwear and a stainless steel water bottle.
* We went on a 60-minute nature drive through the Dubai Desert Conservation Reserve. We saw a large variety of native flora and fauna; Arabian Oryx, gazelles, birds, fishes, Ghaf trees and more!
* We had canapés while learning about falconry, then went on a camel ride as the sun was slowly setting over the horizon.
* We ended the amazing day in a luxurious desert camp with a 6-course dinner in our private cabana and an acrobatic performance and fire show!

Please check @platinumheritage website for packages and prices. 

Save this in your Dubai Bucket List!
